message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam linetype ortho

class BindableBase << (C,#b6e3b6) >>
class UserViewModel << (C,#b6e3b6) >> {
  - _selectedOwnedCommand : ICommand?
  - _selectedFollowingCommand : ICommand?
  - _offerCommand : ICommand?
  - _selectedPlant : IPlant?
  - _selectedFollow : IOfferFollow?
  - _filterText : string = ""
  - _isOwnedDetails : bool
  + User : IUser? «get»
  + FilterText : string «get» «set»
  + SelectedPlant : IPlant? «get» «set»
  + SelectedFollow : IOfferFollow? «get» «set»
  --
  + UserViewModel(eventAggregator:IEventAggregator, plantStore:IPlantStore, regionManager:IRegionManager, authService:IAuthService, dialogService:IDialogService)
  + «async» LoadPlants() : void
  + FilterPlants() : void
  + «async» AddFollow(offerId:int) : Task
  + NavigateDetails(args:SelectionChangedEventArgs, isOwned:bool) : void
  + «override» OnPropertyChanged(args:PropertyChangedEventArgs) : void
  + «async» OpenOffer(arg:object) : void
}

interface IPlantStore << (C,#b6e3b6) >>
interface IRegionManager << (C,#b6e3b6) >>
interface IAuthService << (C,#b6e3b6) >>
interface IDialogService << (C,#b6e3b6) >>
interface ICommand << (C,#b6e3b6) >>

class ICollectionView << (C,#b6e3b6) >>
class "ObservableCollection`1" as ObservableCollection1 << (C,#b6e3b6) >>

BindableBase <|-- UserViewModel

UserViewModel --> IPlantStore : _plantStore
UserViewModel --> IRegionManager : _regionManager
UserViewModel --> IAuthService : _authService
UserViewModel --> IDialogService : _dialogService

UserViewModel --> ICommand : _selectedFollowingCommand
UserViewModel --> ICommand : _selectedOwnedCommand
UserViewModel --> ICommand : _offerCommand

UserViewModel o-- ICollectionView : FilteredPlants\n_filteredPlants
UserViewModel o-- ObservableCollection1 : OfferFollows\n_offerFollows<IOfferFollow>

@enduml
